initiatives.title: GenAI academic guidelines

initiatives.title: Mines AI/ML library guide authenticated tool access
initiatives.description: Colorado School of Mines library guidance identifies Google Gemini for students, faculty and staff through Mines credentials and a limited Microsoft Copilot pilot for faculty and staff.
initiatives.significance: Adds source-backed detail to the public AI posture.

investment.description: No public dollar amount disclosed for this initiative.

initiatives.title: Wendian and Mio research-computing systems
initiatives.description: Mines Research Computing documents Wendian and Mio as its main HPC systems; Wendian has 87 compute nodes, nine Nvidia GPU nodes and two OpenPower nodes.

narrative_summary: Colorado School of Mines shows an AI posture with five documented initiatives across 4 categories. The evidence emphasizes AI strategic initiative, GenAI academic guidelines, and AI literacy across curriculum. Policy maturity is coded as comprehensive based on public guidance, privacy language, governance, or tool controls. The profile also records teaching, research, workforce, equity, or enterprise-tool activity where sources support it. Leadership names, enrollment, GPU counts, and contract values are left null when not found in the cited public sources.
